# iOS Signing Configs
| ID                                     | Name               | Certificate Name | Profiles |
| -------------------------------------- | ------------------ | ---------------- | -------- |
| `e1111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111` | production-signing | Distribution.p12 | 1        |
| `e2222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222` | staging-signing    | Distribution.p12 | 2        |
